title: Atopic dermatitis - self-care
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Atopic dermatitis is a chronic skin disorder with scaly and itchy rashes.
Self-care includes bathing and skin-care routines, moisturizers, trigger avoidance, and clinician-directed medicines.
Patients should seek care for signs of infection or worsening disease.
